_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values. config.json is gitignored — your data stays local.

team._comment: id must match the filename in data/notes/ (e.g. data/notes/se1.md for 1:1 notes)
team.name: First Last

alignment._comment: ae: substring of the AE's last name as it appears in Salesforce Opportunity Owner field

salesforce._comment: domain: your company's Salesforce Lightning URL (e.g. mycompany.lightning.force.com). sales_area_filter: value of Account_Owner_Sales_Area__c used in the SOQL WHERE clause.

fiscal_year._comment: start_month: 1=Jan, 2=Feb, etc. current_quarter_end: last day of the current quarter (YYYY-MM-DD). Used for overdue deal highlighting.

pipeline._comment: Your SFDC/Clari Google Sheet that syncs pipeline data. Used to build deals.json. Find the ID in the URL: docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/SHEET_ID/edit

vf_context_notes._comment: Tab in the same pipeline sheet where you write back manager notes. Created automatically if it doesn't exist.

partners._comment: Google Sheet with your partner account list from Salesforce. Refresh monthly.

events_calendar._comment: Google Sheet maintained by your regional marketing manager with the FY events calendar.

team_weekly_notes._comment: Google Doc where your team's weekly meeting notes are kept. Used to pull travel/activity info for Events & Coverage tab.

goals_docs._comment: Google Drive doc IDs for each SE's individual goals document. Key format: firstname.lastname (lowercase). Used to populate the People tab goals section.

slack._comment: Channel names (without #) Claude Code searches for travel and event mentions when refreshing Events & Coverage.
